subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Muhammad! Rejoice within thy soul, for God hath at this hour caused His glory to shine upon thy countenance and hath wafted unto thee His fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل محمد بشر فی نفسک بما کبر الله حینئذ علی وجهک و ارسل الیک نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
